scores.correctness_notes: Agent describes v4 of the older tls-certificates library rather than charmlibs v1. It only mentions one event (certificate_available) and misses CertificateDeniedEvent. It omits key 'when to request' triggers: revocation by provider and CSR error codes (101-103, 201). The scenarios described (config changes, auto-renewal at 90% expiry) are v4-specific details not aligned with the gold standard's v1 interface contract.
scores.hallucination_notes: The v4 API described (TLSCertificatesRequiresV4, CertificateRequestAttributes, renewal_relative_time, refresh_events, sync(), renew_certificate()) may be genuine older library APIs, but renewal_relative_time default of 0.9 and some specific method names are unverifiable and potentially inaccurate for the actual v4 library. Minor inaccuracies rather than clear fabrications.
